# tfe_project

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the project.

### Optional

- `auto_destroy_activity_duration` (String) Duration after which the project will be auto-destroyed.
- `description` (String) Description of the project.
- `ignore_additional_tags` (Boolean) Explicitly ignores tags created outside of Terraform so they will not be overwritten by tags defined in configuration.
- `organization` (String) Name of the organization to which the project belongs.
- `tags` (Map of String) A map of key-value tags to add to the project.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Service-generated identifier for the variable
